title: GRIDBEAT Drum Machine
description: An 8-track synthesized drum machine with 16/32-step sequencer, swing, FX, and one-click WAV export.
concept: GRIDBEAT is a fully synthesized drum machine — no samples, every sound is generated from scratch using the Web Audio API. Layer kicks, snares, hi-hats, claps, toms, and rims across a 16 or 32-step grid. Dial in BPM, swing, reverb, and distortion, then export a perfect loop as a .wav file for use in your DAW.
features: 8 synthesized drum tracks (kick, snare, open/closed hi-hat, clap, hi-tom, lo-tom, rimshot)
Per-track controls: volume, tune, attack, release
Global reverb, distortion, swing, and master volume
8 genre presets: House, Techno, Hip-Hop, DnB, Trap, Reggae, Funk, Empty
One-click WAV export via OfflineAudioContext (full loop rendered offline)

interaction.click: Toggle steps on/off in the grid; click Play to start the sequencer
interaction.mouse: Drag knobs (vertical) to adjust per-track parameters
interaction.touch: Tap steps to toggle; touch-drag knobs to adjust values
